name: Storm Siren
description: Circle 2 (Lust) — an ancient demoness who has dwelt in the eternal wind so long she has BECOME the wind. She is not blown about — she commands the storm. In life she was the kind of person who destroyed empires through desire: Cleopatra's analog, Helen's shadow. Millennia of circular winds have stretched and perfected her into something beyond beauty — into a force of nature. Gold-crowned horns have grown massive, her body is written over in the sigils of every soul she has ever ensnared, and she trails a perpetual gale that scatters lesser shades before her. To look at her is to forget your purpose.

textToImageTask.prompt: A towering commanding bipedal humanoid female goat demon in A-pose, ancient and terrifyingly beautiful, dark crimson-black fur sleek as velvet, massive sweeping gold-plated horns adorned with rings and chains of past victims, body covered in writhing luminescent desire-sigils, long razor claws tipped with gold, regal torn silk billowing in a perpetual storm wind, violet eyes blazing with ancient predatory intelligence, digitigrade goat legs ending in polished obsidian hooves, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Towering commanding bipedal female goat demon, tall athletic build, large sweeping horns, digitigrade goat legs, A-pose, standing upright with arms extended horizontally

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Dark crimson-black velvet fur, massive gold-plated horns with hanging victim-chain rings, luminescent violet desire-sigils written over every inch of body, gold-tipped razor claws, blazing ancient violet eyes, obsidian polished hooves, shredded ancient silk billowing in phantom wind
